strengths: 6+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Current hands-on work with AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, Docker/Kubernetes, and multi-language proficiency
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin experience; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
Vitest not explicitly listed; testing background skews toward Selenium and D-language tools
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well above the 6-year bar, with a current role directly involving AI agent tooling and MCP — a strong match for the internal automation tooling focus. Core stack alignment on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and Docker/Kubernetes is solid, and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD) fit the role's quality expectations. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and recent Kotlin/Java work are notable but bridgeable given the demonstrated polyglot background.
